age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

comprehension_n_correct.Description: Number of post-listening comprehension questions answered correctly

comprehension_n_total.Description: Total number of comprehension questions administered (8 for most subjects; 4 for an early subset)

comprehension_score.Description: Proportion of comprehension questions answered correctly (comprehension_n_correct / comprehension_n_total)

analyzed.Description: Whether the subject is part of the 'use' set analyzed in Brennan & Hale (2019) after quality control

exclusion_reason.Description: Reason the subject was excluded from the analyzed sample (n/a if analyzed)

Levels.low_comprehension_and_high_noise: excluded for both low comprehension and noisy EEG
